name: ui-tower-defense-board
description: TowerDefenseBoard — game-shell composition with LOLO-driven sprite animation and combat effects.

schema.name: ui-tower-defense-board
schema.description: TowerDefenseBoard — game-shell composition with LOLO-driven sprite animation and combat effects.

emits.description: Emits UI:{placeTowerEvent} with {x,y} on tile click when player places a tower
Emits UI:{startWaveEvent} with {wave} when player launches a creep wave
Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the game reaches won or lost
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset
Emits UI:{moveHeroEvent} with {dx,dy} on arrow-key press to move the player hero
unitClickEvent prop — emitted when a creep is clicked on the canvas

events.name: Place Tower
events.description: Emits UI:{placeTowerEvent} with {x,y} on tile click when player places a tower

events.name: Start Wave
events.description: Emits UI:{startWaveEvent} with {wave} when player launches a creep wave

events.name: Move Hero
events.description: Emits UI:{moveHeroEvent} with {dx,dy} on arrow-key press to move the player hero

events.name: Game End
events.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the game reaches won or lost

events.name: Play Again
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: unitClickEvent prop — emitted when a creep is clicked on the canvas

creepHpScaling.label: Creep HP Scaling
creepHpScaling.description: Additional HP per creep index within a wave

gridWidth.label: Grid Width
gridWidth.description: Number of columns in the tile grid

creepsPerWave.label: Creeps Per Wave
creepsPerWave.description: Number of creeps spawned per wave

creepBaseHp.label: Creep Base HP
creepBaseHp.description: Base HP of the first creep in a wave

maxWaves.label: Max Waves
maxWaves.description: Number of waves to survive to win

goldPerKill.label: Gold Per Kill
goldPerKill.description: Gold awarded for each creep killed

hero.label: Hero
hero.description: Controllable player hero; seeded at map center

tiles.label: Tiles
tiles.description: Direct tile data — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Base-url + terrain/unit/structure sprite maps; towers render as the structure asset.

features.label: Features
features.description: Static map features (structures, decorations) rendered on the board.

path.label: Path
path.description: Ordered waypoint coords that creeps follow from entry to exit.

towerCost.label: Tower Cost
towerCost.description: Gold cost to place one tower

towers.label: Towers
towers.description: Initial tower placements on the board.

gridHeight.label: Grid Height
gridHeight.description: Number of rows in the tile grid

lives.label: Starting Lives
lives.description: Lives the player starts with; reaching 0 = defeat

gold.label: Starting Gold
gold.description: Gold the player starts each game with
